Screen と Component の junction table 未実装. 上記 2 entity が無いため必然的に未実装

access_control_policies.rationale: account_members に参加していれば SELECT 可

access_control_policies.name: ai_hierarchies_account_owner_write
access_control_policies.predicate: account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM account_members WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text AND role = 'account_owner')
access_control_policies.rationale: account_owner のみ書き込み可
